title: Student Academic Performance - 500 Students

resources.description: Primary dataset file with 500 rows and 11 columns. Columns include: student_id, gender, age, study_hours_per_week, attendance_rate, parent_education, internet_access, extracurricular, previous_score, final_score, passed.

subtitle: Student data with grades, study hours and demographics for ML practice
description:
I created this dataset to practice ML classification and regression. It has 500 records of students with their study habits, demographics and exam results.

Columns include stuff like study hours per week, attendance rate, parent education level, previous scores and final scores. The target variable can be `final_score` for regression or `passed` for classification (pass = score >= 50).

Some things to note:
- This is synthetic data I generated, not real student records
- No missing values or duplicates
- Final scores are somewhat correlated with study hours and attendance (as you'd expect)
- Good for beginners who want to practice EDA, classification or regression

Feel free to use it however you want, it's public domain.
